description.zh-Hans: 向图评估上下文注入语义参数覆盖。不处理像素；而是定义语义维度（粗糙度、细节、色彩丰富度、亮度、对比度、风化程度），评估器将这些作为参数覆盖应用到下游节点。
description.en: Injects semantic parameter overrides into the graph evaluation context. Does not process pixels; instead defines semantic dimensions (roughness, detail, color richness, brightness, contrast, weathering) that the evaluator applies as parameter overrides to downstream nodes.

triggers.zh-Hans: 语义控制, 语义参数, 全局覆盖, 粗糙度, 细节, 色彩, 风化
triggers.en: semantic control, semantic override, global parameter, roughness, detail, weathering

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 向管线注入语义参数覆盖，统一控制下游节点的粗糙度、细节和色彩丰富度。
exampleUsage.en: Inject semantic parameter overrides into the pipeline to uniformly control roughness, detail, and color richness of downstream nodes.
